archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Modified for Zero Eye Strain
design_philosophy: Professional, structural, and calm. To reduce eye strain during long editing sessions, we avoid pure white backgrounds on the main body and pure black text. Instead, we use warm bone-whites, deep charcoals, and strict 1px grid structures to separate complex forms. Function over decoration. Asymmetry is used to prioritize the active workspace.

surface.usage: Editor panes, form containers, active content areas

text_primary.usage: Headings, main body text, user inputs

text_secondary.usage: Labels, overlines, secondary descriptions, placeholder text

border.usage: Dividers, form input borders, pane separators

primary_accent.usage: Primary CTA buttons, active sidebar tab highlights, progress indicators

terminal_bg.usage: Comic script generator terminal output area

structure.sidebar: w-[20%] h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 border-r border-[#E5E5E0] bg-[#F9F9F7] flex flex-col z-40

grids.split_pane: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-0 border border-[#E5E5E0] min-h-[70vh]

sidebar_navigation.style: Clean text items. Active state: bg-white border-y border-[#E5E5E0] text-[#1C1C1A] font-medium. Inactive: hover:bg-black/5 text-[#5C5C59]. Include generic avatar at bottom.

forms_inputs.style: No heavy drop shadows. Flat, 1px solid border-[#E5E5E0] focus:border-[#2D3A4B] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#2D3A4B] bg-[#F9F9F7] focus:bg-white transition-colors duration-200. Slight rounded corners (rounded-md).
forms_inputs.labels: Uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-xs font-semibold text-[#5C5C59] mb-2 block

buttons.primary: bg-[#2D3A4B] text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-md font-medium hover:bg-[#1A232E] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#E5E5E0] text-[#1C1C1A] px-6 py-3 rounded-md hover:bg-[#F9F9F7] transition-all

panels_cards.style: Cardless design approach. Use pure white surfaces separated by 1px borders instead of floating boxes with shadows. Keeps the UI grounded and professional.

module_specifics.module_1_latex: Split pane editor. Left pane: textarea with mono font, bg-[#F9F9F7]. Right pane: HTML preview area bg-white.
module_specifics.module_2_comic: Terminal style output must use terminal_bg colors. Input area standard bento form.
module_specifics.module_3_animated: Split layout. Left: question/voiceover inputs. Right: Image upload and video preview.
module_specifics.module_4_ai_prompt: 7-layer form interface. Use an accordion or vertical step-by-step layout (border-l-2 border-[#E5E5E0]) to avoid overwhelming the user. Each layer should be clearly numbered.

user_avatar.description: Professional user avatar for sidebar bottom

comic_placeholder.usage: Placeholder image for Comic script generator output module

video_thumbnail_placeholder.description: School supplies floating with a paper airplane
video_thumbnail_placeholder.usage: Placeholder for Animated video solution generator / AI Video prompt result

technical_instructions.framework: Vanilla HTML5 + Tailwind CSS (via CDN) + Vanilla JavaScript
technical_instructions.tailwind_config_script: You must include <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script> and configure the tailwind.config inside a <script> block to add custom fonts and colors.
technical_instructions.icons: Use Phosphor Icons via CDN (<script src="https://unpkg.com/@phosphor-icons/web"></script>) for crisp, professional line icons matching the typography.
technical_instructions.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, forms) MUST include a data-testid attribute for robust automated testing (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-tab-module1').
technical_instructions.motion: Use minimal transition classes (transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out) on interactive states to maintain a snappy, functional dashboard feel.
